title: Rich Adventurous Beef Bowl
description: A light yet peppery beef bowl dish inspired by Japanese Okinawan cuisine, featuring a tamarind paste-based sauce and crispy lardons. Serve over steamed bok choy for added nutrition.

ingredients.name: tamarind paste-makham
ingredients.notes: available at most Asian grocery stores

ingredients.name: lardons (small pieces of bacon)
ingredients.notes: rendered in a pan until crispy

instructions: In a large pan, cook the lardons over medium heat until crispy, then set aside.
In the same pan, add the sesame oil and cook the beef strips until browned, about 3 minutes per side.
Add the tamarind paste-makham, soy sauce, sugar, and rice vinegar to the pan, stirring to combine.
Bring the sauce to a simmer and let cook for 2-3 minutes, until slightly thickened.
Stir in the cooked lardons and cook for an additional minute.
Serve the beef and sauce over steamed bok choy, garnished with chopped green onions and toasted sesame seeds.
